name: Retail Daily Sales ETL
description: Ingests daily transaction CSV files from S3, enriches with the RDS product catalog, and writes partitioned Parquet to the data warehouse.

name: Customer 360 Aggregation
description: Joins customer profiles, purchase history, and support tickets to build a unified customer view for the analytics layer.

name: Inventory Sync Pipeline
description: Synchronizes warehouse inventory levels from multiple RDS sources into a consolidated S3 dataset refreshed every four hours.

name: Marketing Attribution Model
description: Processes clickstream events and order data to compute multi-touch attribution scores across all active marketing channels.

name: Financial Reconciliation
description: Reconciles payment gateway transactions against internal order records and flags discrepancies for the finance team.
